title: Spawn Eggs Visuals Overhaul
description: The new spawn eggs that are in snapshot 25w08a
body:
**Did you see the new spawn eggs that came out in snapshot 25w08a and thought to yourself, "I wish these were in earlier versions?" Now they are!**

---
# Compatible Versions:
- ![fallback text](https://files.catbox.moe/585byr.png)

# About:
Spawn Eggs Visuals Overhaul (SEVO) takes the new textures from the spawn eggs in snapshot 25w08a and adds them to earlier versions.

# FAQ:
- Q: Will there be any releases for versions under 1.21.4?
  - A: Planning on it.

# Credits:
Textures: Mojang

Icon: Yon (besides the cow spawn egg -> credits to Mojang)
